system.powerDescription:
Blood and viscera clot into a simple object/structure of up to CAT size connected to you by a thick artery. Whilst this power is active adjustments may be made to the objects form (smoothing out stairs, mending holes, creating pitfalls, etc.) but you suffer any stress that the object would. When you move more than short range away from the object the artery connecting you to it is severed ending this power. When this power ends the object rapidly rots and shrivels away into dust and mush. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this effect. This power may alter the parameters of a roll whilst active.
